tools.name: subagent_spawn
tools.description: Spawn an independent subagent to work on a task in parallel. The subagent runs autonomously and its results are reported back when complete.

label.description: Short human-readable label for this subagent (e.g. "Research competitor pricing")

objective.description: The task objective — what the subagent should accomplish

context.description: Optional additional context to pass to the subagent

send_result_to_user.description: Whether to present the subagent's result to the user when it completes. Defaults to true. Set to false for internal/silent processing.

reason.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: subagent_status
tools.description: Get the status of a specific subagent or list all subagents for the current session. Only use this when the user explicitly asks about subagent status — do NOT poll automatically, as you will be notified when subagents complete.

subagent_id.description: Optional subagent ID to query. If omitted, returns all subagents for this session.

reason.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: subagent_abort
tools.description: Abort a running subagent by ID.

subagent_id.description: The ID of the subagent to abort.

reason.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: subagent_message
tools.description: Send a follow-up message to a running subagent.

subagent_id.description: The ID of the subagent to send a message to.

content.description: The message content to send to the subagent.

reason.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

tools.name: subagent_read
tools.description: Read the full conversation output from a subagent. Use this after a subagent completes to retrieve its full work product.

subagent_id.description: The ID of the subagent whose output to read.

reason.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called
